name: Cliff Booth
description: Cliff Booth's speech in "Once Upon a Time in Hollywood" is marked by a Southern Californian drawl and a laid-back, almost lazy, tone. He often uses informal language and employs a distinctive surfer slang, embodying the relaxed vibe of the late 1960s in Los Angeles. This includes phrases like "man" and "cool" that were commonly associated with the surfer subculture of that era.
creator: PouLionFromMadagascar2
